envelope.reason: The doorway present on the right-hand wall in the baseline image has been removed and filled, resulting in a continuous flat wall surface in the staged image. This constitutes an alteration of the architectural envelope and wall plane continuity.

reasons: The door on the right-hand wall has been removed and replaced with a solid wall.
